final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing cover image for a WeChat article announcing the 染秋 fragrance launch.

Style/medium: needs a premium/luxury aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered composition with the title as the focal point
Subject: must include the fragrance product context for the 染秋 launch
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an autumn atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs an autumn-inspired direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" (main title), "秋意染染 时光留香" (subtitle)
Constraints: must preserve the 900x500 aspect ratio, title must be prominently featured
Avoid:
